codex_response:
Implemented `a6953f00` as a new ARC2 task package in [__init__.py](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_a6953f00/__init__.py), [verifier.py](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_a6953f00/verifier.py#L4), and [generator.py](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_a6953f00/generator.py#L21). The rule is: extract the top-left `2x2` block when the input width is odd, otherwise extract the top-right `2x2` block. Both summary hints matched the official examples, so I used them; no `notes.md` was needed. No new primitive was added.

Verification and outputs completed cleanly:
- Official verifier check passed: `4/4`.
- Generated build completed for 1000 examples into [task.json](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/a6953f00/task.json) with previews [originals.png](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/a6953f00/previews/originals.png), [preview_01.png](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/a6953f00/previews/preview_01.png), [preview_02.png](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/a6953f00/previews/preview_02.png), and [preview_03.png](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/a6953f00/previews/preview_03.png).
- Generated-example verification passed: `1000/1000`.

The generator stays close to the task family by using dense random square grids, explicitly planting the `2x2` output patch into the parity-selected corner, and rejecting cases where the opposite top corner would accidentally match and blur the rule. I couldn’t use the dedicated local image viewer under the current tool restriction, so the final sanity check was done by inspecting generated examples directly from `task.json`.
